description_long: This hammer features a cylindrical, olive-green metal head with a smooth, unmarked striking surface and a slightly rounded top. The head is attached to a straight, light-colored wooden handle that tapers gently in the middle for grip and widens slightly at both ends. The handle appears to be unfinished or lightly varnished, showing a natural wood grain texture. The base of the handle is capped with a dark band, likely for reinforcement or to prevent splitting. The overall design is utilitarian, with no visible ergonomic enhancements or decorative elements. There are no visible signs of wear, branding, or additional attachments on the hammer.
description: A utilitarian hammer with a cylindrical olive-green metal head and a straight, light wood handle capped at the base. The design is simple, with no visible branding or wear.
description_view_0: Front view shows the cylindrical head with faint markings and the straight wooden handle with a dark cap at the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the uniform cylindrical shape of the head and the gentle taper of the handle.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the smooth, unmarked back of the head and the full length of the handle.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the same cylindrical head and handle, with no additional features visible.
attribute_handle_type: Straight wooden handle with a natural finish, gently tapered in the middle and capped with a dark band at the base. The surface appears smooth with visible wood grain and no ergonomic enhancements.
attribute_head_type: Cylindrical sledge-type head made of metal, olive-green in color, with a flat striking face and a slightly rounded top. No claws or additional striking surfaces are present.
